message:
fix: remove unfair subprocess comparisons from specialized benchmarks

- bench_feature_engineering: already uses CLI subprocess for all engines (fair)
- bench_hybrid_search: now focuses on GPU optimization (vector-first vs filter-first)
- bench_embedding_pipeline: now focuses on pipeline throughput measurement
- bench_logic_table: now focuses on compiled @logic_table performance

Removed misleading "500x faster" comparisons that measured subprocess
overhead instead of actual compute. Each benchmark now clearly states
what it measures and points to ./scripts/bench-sql.sh for fair
CLI-based comparisons.
